tool_args.label: OMNY MTA's New Fare Payment System
tool_args.raw_text: OMNY is a D/B project that replaces MTA's Subway, Bus and Commuter Railroad fare systems. Contract awarded to Cubic Transportation Systems in November 2017.

payload.description: One Metro New York (OMNY) is a D/B project replacing MTA's Subway, Bus and Commuter Railroad fare systems. tool_args.label: IEC forecasts 15-month delay for OMNY
tool_args.raw_text: IEC forecasts a 15-month delay to overall project completion beyond the original July 2023 Substantial Completion.

payload.claim_text: IEC forecasts a 15-month delay to overall project completion beyond the original July 2023 Substantial Completion.
payload.description: OMNY project completion delayed from July 2023 to estimated 3Q 2024 due to prolonged scope finalization with contractor, CVM deployment delays, ORS delays, and weekly fare capping software requirements.

evidence_refs.source_quote: IEC forecasts a 15-month delay to overall project completion beyond the original July 2023 Substantial Completion.

payload.description: Utility issue at Lorimer Station is the most significant driver of schedule slippage for the ADA Eight Stations project.
payload.subject: ADA Eight Stations project

evidence_refs.source_quote: The IEC notes that multiple issues are driving the schedule slippage, however, the utility issue at Lorimer Station remains the most significant.
The lack of an agreement with National Grid.

tool_args.label: C&D Stations BU awarded twice annual average in 2021
tool_args.raw_text: In 2021, C&D awarded twice the annual average, illustrating improved project performance through Project Bundling and Front-End Loading strategies.

payload.claim_text: In 2021, C&D awarded twice the annual average, illustrating improved project performance through Project Bundling and Front-End Loading strategies.
payload.description: Stations Business Unit awarded nine contracts totaling $1.4B in 2021, exceeding the $1.3B initial goal and doubling the three-year average of ~$0.7B.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Stations BU exceeded that goal and awarded nine contracts, bringing the total for the year to $1.4B instead of the initial $1.3B. Moreover, historically, yearly awards over the past three years averaged around $0.7B. In 2021, C&D awarded twice the annual average, illustrating improved project performance through Project Bundling and Front-End Loading strategies.

payload.claim_text: Staff attrition – an MTA-wide issue – continues to affect the Stations Business Unit.
payload.description: Below-market rate salary poses enormous challenge to hiring, retaining key employees, and improving staff confidence.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Staff attrition – an MTA-wide issue – continues to affect the Stations Business Unit. C&D has obtained permission to hire additional staff. However, the below-market rate salary poses as an enormous challenge to the organization.

payload.description: OMNY validator hardware issues require further investigation and possible design update for improved reliability. Erroneous maintenance messages require field visits.
payload.subject: OMNY program
